TextView.android:text:
Tracking Your Progress

1. Journal Daily
Write down one small win every single evening.

2. Take Photos
Use visual evidence to see changes over time.

3. Track Measurements
Focus on dimensions, not just the scale weight.

4. Monitor Strength
Note when exercises feel easier or weights go up.

5. Check Energy Levels
Observe if you feel more alert throughout the day.

6. Sleep Quality
Track how many hours of restful sleep you get.

7. Habit Streaks
Use a calendar to mark off days you stayed on track.

8. Review Monthly
Look back every 30 days to adjust your strategy.

9. Listen to Your Body
Recognize when you need rest versus more effort.

10. Reward Milestones
Treat yourself when you hit a major breakthrough.
